R={"\089\086\070\103\114\109\101\098\074\114\061\061";"\102\115\082\105\079\088\122\109\065\073\061\061","\084\067\117\087\070\111\113\054\116\086\073\061";"\086\073\097\081\068\109\068\077\104\057\055\070\115\101\113\085\085\079\121\106\100\050\118\085\084\051\065\084\120\116\067\109\057\075\104\052\120\071\103\068\087\107\097\121\083\077\056\114\053\101\077\110\089\078\115\105\109\114\081\110\108\099\083\105\043\103\061\061";"\072\047\115\079\047\070\112\103\085\109\106\105\083\073\061\061","\079\078\082\106\119\049\070\056\112\088\109\047\119\076\061\061";"\078\055\108\100\086\069\114\075\068\083\098\070\103\121\082\089\102\077\109\103\111\086\056\069\117\069\100\081\113\081\068\065\057\108\069\047\043\074\068\087\075\090\113\109","\108\098\087\049\104\066\069\078\048\098\105\084\065\086\104\071\117\050\119\080\089\122\043\056\051\067\104\098\116\076\057\108\112\122\111\115\056\097\048\112\107\088\109\053\076\082\113\097\066\117\086\055\111\087\077\078\106\103\061\061","\118\089\108\111\119\114\061\061";"\121\056\070\072\070\085\122\057\114\109\085\068\068\057\054\068";"\080\067\065\081\121\078\072\104\110\105\076\080";"\066\074\074\069\082\071\089\087\120\052\103\061";"\075\082\111\076\115\077\068\101\068\113\108\072\121\077\053\102\089\084\100\081\105\078\099\061","\112\057\054\056\079\110\054\056\052\102\122\106\052\088\074\109";"\077\115\105\117\054\057\074\111\116\111\097\114\101\111\109\089\116\073\061\061";"\081\053\048\049\068\071\099\057\087\122\098\090","\056\047\121\051\114\083\075\068\043\073\061\061","\116\107\122\107\077\078\085\070\077\088\076\086\068\054\105\070\068\107\098\061";"\088\089\071\049\101\122\085\102\077\052\120\100\043\043\085\116\111\056\076\061";"\107\090\107\053\083\099\122\067\081\073\082\079\108\054\089\054\050\070\106\068\105\078\117\049\067\079\082\115\065\066\083\052";"\101\049\090\074\065\098\048\088\111\114\061\061","\114\108\097\109\052\102\122\109\114\111\054\056\121\078\082\047","\090\068\118\104\088\097\070\043\068\108\0 return(function(R,l,P,q,v,a,F,b,C,p,Q,o,S,s,D,Y,e,N,T,i,f,I,y,U)D,y,p,f,C,b,U,N,T,o,S,Q,s,e,i,I,Y=function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q)return Q(R,{P,q},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q,v,a)return Q(R,{P,q;v,a},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function()return Q(R,{},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q,v,a,F,S,I,i,s)return Q(R,{P,q,v;a;F,S,I,i,s},r,l)end return P end,function(R)I[R]=I[R]-(295469-295468)if 603638+-603638==I[R]then I[R],S[R]=nil,nil end end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q,v,a,F)return Q(R,{P;q,v,a,F},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P)return Q(R,{P},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(...)return Q(R,{...},r,l)end return P end,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q,v)return Q(R,{P,q,v},r,l)end return P end,function(R)for r=-610157-(-610158),#R,-604241+604242 do I[R[r]]=I[R[r]]+(95436-95435)end if P then local Q=P(true)local l=v(Q)l[r(850666-815479)],l[r(587280+-552121)],l[r(210671-175430)]=R,Y,function()return-1016866+1318564 end return Q else return q({},{[r(-769251+804410)]=Y;[r(-843054+878241)]=R,[r(-184371-(-219612))]=function()return-394979+696677 end})end end,{},function(Q,P,q,v)local u,I9,k,K,Q9,m,O,Y9,w,h,s9,o,R9,v9,F9,S9,W,r9,B,N,G,d,q9,o9,I,M,j,A,E,a9,x,J,L,i9,n,Z,z,H,X,t,g,P9,V,c,Y,s,l9,F while Q do if Q<-778828+10077838 then if Q<6205657-728012 then if Q<2890110-(-46285)then l(F)end,298941+-298941,function(R,r)local l=o(r)local P=function(P,q,v,a,F,S,I)return Q(R,{P,q,v;a;F,S,I},r,l)end return P end,function()s=(503647+-503646)+s I[s]=322610+-322609 return s end,{},function(R)local r,Q=968035+-968034,R[-6111-(-6112)]while Q do I[Q],r=I[Q]-(-740527-(-740528)),(973873+-973872)+r if-906579+906579==I[Q]then I[Q],S[Q]=nil,nil end Q=R[r]end end return(N(15923492-(-352509),{}))(l(F))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(-741242+776489)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
